title: FreeCam
description: Client-side free camera with F6 follow view.
body:
# FreeCam 🎥 > **Detach your camera. Your player stays. No freezing, no limits within loaded chunks.** **FreeCam** gives you a separate camera entity you can fly through your world with — inspect builds, scout areas, get a perfect screenshot angle — while your player stands still and stays visible. Disable it and you're instantly back. The **F6 follow camera** locks a high, wide-angle view behind you. Full player control, camera just follows along. > ⚠️ **Client-side only** — no server installation required. The server does not need the mod installed. --- ## At a Glance 📌 | | | |:--|:--| | **Loaders** | Fabric · Forge | | **Type** | Client-side | | **License** | MIT | | **Dependencies** | Fabric API *(Fabric only)* | --- ## Features ✨ - Separate camera entity — player stays visible and unfrozen - Fly through blocks freely within render distance - **F6 follow camera** — high and far behind the player, auto-pulls back at walls - Full player control in F6 mode (run, jump, look around normally) - Configurable distance, height, and collision behavior for the follow cam - Full brightness option while FreeCam is active - Optional hand, player model, and fog visibility toggles - Multiplayer-unsafe interactions removed --- ## Keybinds ⌨️ | Key | Action | |:--:|:--| | `F4` | Toggle free camera | | `F6` | Toggle follow camera | | `F4 + 1–9` | Tripod mode — save and switch camera positions *(Fabric only)* | | Unbound | Config screen · Reset tripod | --- ## Settings ⚙️ | Category | Options | |:--|:--| | **Movement** | Flight mode, horizontal speed, vertical speed | | **Collision** | Transparent blocks, openable blocks, all collision | | **Visual** | Perspective, show player, show hand, full brightness, submersion fog | | **F6 Camera** | Distance, height, wall occlusion | | **Utility** | Disable on damage, notifications | --- ## Available Versions ✅ | Minecraft | Fabric | Forge | |:--:|:--:|:--:| | **26.1.x** | ✅ | — | | **1.21.x** | ✅ | — | | **1.20.x** | ✅ | — | | **1.19.x** | ✅ | — | | **1.18.x** | ✅ | — | | **1.17.x** | ✅ | — | | **1.8.9** | — | ✅ | --- ## Requirements 📦 | Loader | Requirements | |:--|:--| | **Fabric** | [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) | | **Fabric (optional)** | [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) for the settings screen | | **Forge** | None | ---

The software is provided **"as is"**, without warranty of any kind.
📦 Usage & Permissions You may use **FreeCam** in: - Modpacks - Videos - Screenshots - Personal Minecraft setups - Local worlds and private testing setups Please check server rules before using any camera mod in multiplayer. Even client-side camera mods may be against the rules on some servers.
